description: Run a WIQL query to search for work items (read-only, use ado_query)
Get a single work item by ID
Get multiple work items by IDs (comma-separated)
Create a new work item of the given type (Bug, Task, User Story, etc.)
params: JSON Patch array: [{op, path, value}] for fields like /fields/System.Title

description: Update an existing work item (change title, state, assigned to, etc.)
params: JSON Patch array: [{op: replace, path: /fields/System.Title, value: ...}]

description: Delete a work item (moves to recycle bin)
List all work item types available in a project (Bug, Task, Epic, User Story, etc.)
List all Git repositories in the organization or project
Get a specific Git repository by ID or name
List branches and tags for a repository
List commits for a repository
List pull requests for a repository
Create a new pull request
Get a specific pull request by ID
Update a pull request (change title, description, status, auto-complete)
List builds (pipeline runs)
Queue a new build (trigger a pipeline)
Get a specific build by ID
List pipelines (definitions)
Run a pipeline
List saved work item queries (shared and personal)
List member entitlements (users and their access levels). Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
Add a member entitlement (grant a user access to the org with a specific license). Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
params: body: { accessLevel: { accountLicenseType: 'express'|'stakeholder'|'earlyAdopter'|'professional' }, user: { principalName: 'user@domain.com', subjectKind: 'user' }, projectEntitlements: [{ group: { groupType: 'projectContributor' }, projectRef: { id: projectId } }] }

description: Get a specific member entitlement by member ID. Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
Update a member entitlement (change access level, add/remove project access). Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
Remove a member entitlement (revoke user access). Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
Bulk add user entitlements (add multiple users at once). Use host vsapm.dev.azure.com.
params: body: array of { accessLevel, user, projectEntitlements }

description: List users in the organization (Graph API). Use host vssps.dev.azure.com.
List groups in the organization. Use host vssps.dev.azure.com.
List group memberships for a user or group. Use host vssps.dev.azure.com.
params: direction (up = groups user belongs to, down = members of group)

description: Add a user to a group. Use host vssps.dev.azure.com.
Remove a user from a group. Use host vssps.dev.azure.com.
List teams in a project
Get a specific team by ID
Create a new team in a project
List members of a team
List iterations (sprints) for a team
Add an iteration to a team's sprint schedule
Remove an iteration from a team's sprint schedule
List iteration path tree (project-level iteration nodes)
Create a new iteration node (sprint)
List area path tree (project-level area nodes)
Create a new area path node
Delete a classification node (area or iteration). structureGroup is 'areas' or 'iterations'.
params: $reclassifyId (move items to this node before deleting)

description: List service hook subscriptions (webhooks for events)
Create a service hook subscription (webhook)
params: publisherId, eventType, consumerId, consumerActionId, publisherInputs, consumerInputs
